description_long: This is a modern, full-size pickup truck with a bold, angular design and a bright red exterior. The vehicle features a four-door crew cab configuration, providing ample space for passengers, and a large open cargo bed at the rear for transporting goods. The front end is equipped with a prominent grille, integrated headlights, and a set of auxiliary lights mounted on the lower bumper. The wheels are large, with rugged, off-road tires and black alloy rims, suggesting capability for both urban and rough terrain. The side mirrors are substantial, and the windows are tinted for privacy and sun protection. The rear of the truck includes a tailgate and visible taillights, with the manufacturer's badge centered on the back.
description: A bright red, four-door pickup truck with a spacious crew cab and a large open cargo bed, featuring rugged wheels and a bold front grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, integrated headlights, auxiliary bumper lights, and wide stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door crew cab, large cargo bed, and rugged wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tailgate, taillights, and manufacturer's badge, with the cargo bed clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crew cab, cargo bed, and off-road wheels.
